seo.description: Vigil Services Ltd is the parent group behind Vigil's London home care, healthcare staffing, security and commercial cleaning divisions. Choose the service you need from the menu.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Vigil Services Ltd
fields.sub: Specialist London divisions for home care, healthcare staffing, security and commercial cleaning — choose the service you need from the menu above.

fields.body: Vigil Services Ltd is the parent group behind Vigil's specialist divisions across London: home care, healthcare staffing, security and commercial cleaning. Each division runs its own dedicated site — use the navigation to go straight to the service you're looking for.
Vigil Services Ltd is registered in England and Wales, company registration 11756806, at Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU. For general enquiries, email info@vigilservices.co.uk.
